en.title: Web Development in Prague | Creative Web Agency
en.description: Creative and reliable web development services in Prague. We help businesses connect with their audience through beautiful and functional websites.
en.h1: Engineering Digital Excellence for Prague's Growing Tech Scene
en.p: Scale your Prague startup or enterprise with AVPdev: custom Next.js applications, high-speed Astro landing pages, and Telegram-driven automation.

benefits.title: Elite Web Performance for Prague
benefits.desc: We build Astro and Next.js websites for Prague's growing startup and tech scene, achieving 90+ Lighthouse scores and top search rankings.

benefits.title: Intelligent Automation Bots
benefits.desc: Custom Telegram bots for Prague businesses: lead capture, notifications, and 24/7 customer service on autopilot.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Prague?
faq.a: Pricing starts from €250 for Astro landing pages and €300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from €750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from €50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
